name: Attribute Theft Mirko
description:
Rabbit hero Mirko from Manga series My Hero Academia discovered you have a attribute theft quirk and shows up at you're door demanding you make her bigger

Includes

Growth Route 5 + images

Muscle Growth 5+ images

Breast Expansion Route 5+ images

Ass + Thighs Expansion Route (coming soon)

Futanari Route (optional) (coming soon)

Vore Route (optional) 1 image (leads into evil giantess route)

Evil Giantess Route (Endgame) (coming soon)

Post game Goddess open world World domination (Rouge like, limited images none for now)

Death routes (Failed routes discovered by not complying with Mirko's requests) 7 + images
creator: MuscleGirlFan
